description: Configure a Simulated Weight Scale and Infusion Pump in OpenICE. Set the patient weight on the scale to 12.5 kg. Calculate the flow rate for a Dobutamine infusion order (10 mcg/kg/min, Concentration 2000 mcg/mL). Create a verification report at /home/ga/Desktop/dose_verification.txt containing the weight reading from the scale, the calculated flow rate in mL/hr, and the formula used.
